title: Get Daily Activity Summary
description: Retrieves a summary and list of a user’s activities and activity log entries for a given day.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

response_fields.name: activityLog : activityId
response_fields.description: The ID of the activity.

response_fields.name: activityLog : activityParentId
response_fields.description: The ID of the top level ("parent") activity.

response_fields.name: activityLog : activityParentName
response_fields.description: The name of the top level ("parent") activity.

response_fields.name: activities : calories
response_fields.description: Number of calories burned during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : description
response_fields.description: The description of the recorded exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : detailsLink
response_fields.description: An endpoint that provides additional details about the user's activity either manually logged on the mobile application or API, or auto-recognized by the Fitbit device. Activities recorded using the device's exercise app are not supported.

response_fields.name: activities : distance
response_fields.description: Distance traveled during the on-device recorded exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : duration
response_fields.description: The activeDuration (milliseconds) + any pauses that occurred during the activity recording.

response_fields.name: activities : hasActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: activities : hasStartTime
response_fields.description: Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: activities : isFavorite
response_fields.description: Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: activities : lastModified
response_fields.description: Timestamp the exercise was last modified.

response_fields.name: activities : logId
response_fields.description: The activity log identifier for the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : name
response_fields.description: Name of the recorded exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : startDate
response_fields.description: The start date of the recorded exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : startTime
response_fields.description: The start time of the recorded exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : steps
response_fields.description: Number of steps recorded during the exercise.

response_fields.name: goals : activeMinutes
response_fields.description: User defined goal for daily active minutes.

response_fields.name: goals : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: User defined goal for daily calories burned.

response_fields.name: goals : distance
response_fields.description: User defined goal for daily distance traveled.

response_fields.name: goals : floors
response_fields.description: User defined goal for daily floor count.

response_fields.name: goals : steps
response_fields.description: User defined goal for daily step count.

response_fields.name: summary : activeScore
response_fields.description: Functionality removed. A response is returned for backward compatibility. Supported: -1

response_fields.name: summary : activityCalories
response_fields.description: The number of calories burned for the day during periods the user was active above sedentary level. This includes both activity burned calories and BMR.

response_fields.name: summary : caloriesEstimationMu
response_fields.description: Total estimated calories burned for the day based on measurement uncertainty.

response_fields.name: summary : caloriesBMR
response_fields.description: Total BMR calories burned for the day.

response_fields.name: summary : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: Total calories burned for the day (daily timeseries total).

response_fields.name: summary : caloriesOutUnestimated
response_fields.description: Total unestimated calories burned for the day.

response_fields.name: summary : distances : activity
response_fields.description: Supported : <activity name> | total | tracker | loggedActivities | veryActive | moderatelyActive | lightlyActive | sedentaryActive

response_fields.name: summary : distances : distance
response_fields.description: For the specified resource, the distance traveled for the day displayed in the units defined by the Accept-Language header.

response_fields.name: summary : elevation
response_fields.description: The elevation traveled for the day displayed in the units defined by the Accept-Language header.

response_fields.name: summary : fairlyActiveMinutes
response_fields.description: Total minutes the user was fairly/moderately active.

response_fields.name: summary : floors
response_fields.description: The equivalent floors climbed for the day displayed in the units defined by the Accept-Language header.

response_fields.name: summary : heartRateZones : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: summary : heartRateZones : max
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: summary : heartRateZones : min
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: summary : heartRateZones : minutes
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: summary : heartRateZones : name
response_fields.description: Heart Rate scope is required to see this value. Supported : Out of Range | Fat Burn | Cardio | Peak

response_fields.name: summary : lightlyActiveMinutes
response_fields.description: Total minutes the user was lightly active.

response_fields.name: summary : marginalCalories
response_fields.description: Total marginal estimated calories burned for the day.

response_fields.name: summary : restingHeartRate
response_fields.description: The user’s calculated resting heart rate. The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value. See Resting Heart Rate .

response_fields.name: summary : sedentaryMinutes
response_fields.description: Total minutes the user was sedentary.

response_fields.name: summary : steps
response_fields.description: Total steps taken for the day.

response_fields.name: summary : useEstimation
response_fields.description: Boolean value stating if estimations are used in calculations. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: summary : veryActiveMinutes
response_fields.description: Total minutes the user was very active.
